name: OpenAQ Air Quality
description: Air quality data (PM2.5, PM10, NO2, O3, SO2, CO) from government monitoring stations worldwide via OpenAQ v3 API. Supports city names (auto-geocoded) or coordinates.

credentials_required.label: OpenAQ API Key
credentials_required.hint: Free via https://explore.openaq.org/register — sign up, then go to account/API Keys.

tools.name: get_air_quality
tools.description: Current air quality (PM2.5, PM10, NO2, O3, etc.) at a city or coordinates

tools.name: find_stations
tools.description: List nearby air quality monitoring stations

tools.name: get_station_history
tools.description: Daily mean values for a parameter at a station (last N days)

author: freddy-schuetz
